title: To whom bond payable
doc_html:
§183.  To whom bond payable

The bonds of state officers shall be made payable to the governor, and those of the parish officers to the president of the police jury or other governing authority of the parish.
doc_text:
§183.  To whom bond payable
The bonds of state officers shall be made payable to the governor, and those of the parish officers to the president of the police jury or other governing authority of the parish.
